channel.title: Crypt on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Crypt on David's Blog

item.title: 对称加密和非对称加密 - 课堂笔记
item.description: 本篇从以前上课笔记搬过来的, 那时候用于复习, 查找资料的时候就没有加上引用, 很多信息没 reference, 1. Secret Key Cryptography Secret key cryptography also known as symmetric cryptography. Very fast. So some use public key cryptography at the begining ( to transmit a
